Container.Name: satisfactory-server
Container.Overview: Satisfactory Dedicated Server with embedded SFTP mod management and Tailscale VPN. Fully optimized for peak single-thread tick performance and network bandwidth.
Container.Description: Satisfactory Dedicated Server with embedded SFTP mod management and Tailscale VPN. Fully optimized for peak single-thread tick performance and network bandwidth.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Satisfactory server persistent configuration directory.

Config.Name: Saves & Blueprints Directory
Config.Description: Location for game saves and blueprints. Highly recommended to use a direct cache pool path (e.g., /mnt/cache/...) to bypass FUSE filesystem overhead and prevent autosave stutters.

Config.Name: Game Files Directory
Config.Description: Location for game installation files (~8GB+). Can be placed on a standard user share or array disk to save SSD space.

Config.Name: Server Backups Directory
Config.Description: Location for automatic backups of your game saves.

Config.Name: Mod Manager Configs
Config.Description: Location for mod configurations and CLI metadata.

Config.Name: Game Port (UDP)
Config.Description: Main game server port (UDP)

Config.Name: Game Port (TCP)
Config.Description: Main game server port (TCP)

Config.Name: Messaging Port
Config.Description: Server messaging and query port (TCP)

Config.Name: SFTP Port
Config.Description: Built-in SFTP server port for remote Satisfactory Mod Manager (SMM) connections

Config.Name: TUN Device Path
Config.Description: TUN device endpoint (Required for Tailscale VPN connection)

Config.Name: SFTP Username
Config.Description: Username for SFTP login. Used by SMM to connect and upload mods.

Config.Name: SFTP Password
Config.Description: Password for SFTP login. Used by SMM to connect and upload mods.

Config.Name: Tailscale Auth Key
Config.Description: Your Tailscale auth/OAuth key. If provided, the container automatically registers with your Tailnet.

Config.Name: Tailscale Hostname
Config.Description: The hostname this server will use on your Tailnet.

Config.Name: Max Players
Config.Description: Max players allowed on the server.

Config.Name: Max Objects
Config.Description: UObject allocation ceiling (increases memory but prevents crash on massive late-game bases).

Config.Name: Max Tick Rate
Config.Description: Max tick rate for the server. Do not increase this beyond 30 on lower frequency server processors.

Config.Name: GC Time Between Purges
Config.Description: Unreal Engine Garbage Collection interval in seconds. Lowering this to 30 reduces late-game GC frame spikes.

Config.Name: GC Objects Per Step
Config.Description: Maximum number of objects to purge in a single Garbage Collection step. Lower values prevent game loop hitching.

Config.Name: Autosave Rotation Count
Config.Description: Number of rotating autosave files to keep.

Config.Name: Client Timeout
Config.Description: Timeout limit in seconds before disconnecting inactive client sessions.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID of the user the server will run as.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID of the user the server will run as.

Config.Name: Steam Beta Branch
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to install the Experimental branch of the game.

Config.Name: Skip Steam Update
Config.Description: Avoid updating the game files on container start.

Config.Name: SteamCMD Validate
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to force SteamCMD to check hashes for all game files on boot. Keep 'false' for regular restarts to reduce boot time from minutes to seconds.

Config.Name: Container Timezone
Config.Description: Set the container timezone (e.g. America/New_York or Australia/Sydney) so server logs and backups match your local time.

Config.Name: Disable Seasonal Events
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to disable seasonal events (such as FICSMAS) inside the game.

Config.Name: Prune Server Logs
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to prevent the container from clearing old log files on startup.

Config.Name: Server Streaming
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to enable asset streaming, which optimizes server memory utilization.

Config.Name: VM Override
Config.Description: Set to true to skip the hypervisor processor check (only if CPU is recognized as generic QEMU/KVM).
